title: Language Change - Consecutive language change
scenario: Consecutive language changes via Device Settings > Language fail after firmware update prompt on second attempt
steps: 1. Pair and connect the Poly Bluetooth headset to the phone.
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected [Device Name].
4. In Device Settings, tap the Language section.
5. Select a new language from the list.
6. Allow the firmware update to apply the language change to complete successfully.
7. After the update completes, repeat steps 4–6: tap Language section again, select another new language, and allow the firmware update to apply.
8. Observe the result after both consecutive language changes.
expected: Both consecutive language changes should complete successfully. The headset should apply the new language after each firmware update without errors or failures.
